_comment: Edit this file to post a meet up. Copy a block, change the values. `date` is YYYY-MM-DD. Past dates auto show as 'past'. Set `capacity` to a number or leave null. Set `soldOut` true to close RSVPs.

events.title: The first one
events.blurb: Nothing fancy. A few of us, some music, see who turns up.

events.title: Slow Sunday
events.blurb: Quiet start, easy pace, see where it goes.
